fields.title: Port backlog schema, reducer, and materializer into tau
fields.description: Bring the reusable backlog domain logic from Erg into tau and adapt it from canonical snapshot mutation to deterministic event replay and local materialization.
fields.design: Create a new extensions/tau/src/backlog/ slice that ports schema, query, graph, and ID concepts into tau-native code. Replace snapshot-write store logic with an event reducer that replays immutable events into current issue state and emits an ignored .pi/backlog/cache/issues.jsonl cache for fast reads. Preserve imported unknown fields and reject dependency cycles before invalid events are written.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Tau can materialize current issues from backlog events into local cache. Dependency cycles are rejected before invalid events are written. Query features such as ready, blocked, filters, and dependency views work off replayed state. Imported unknown fields survive replay and rematerialization.
